hooks.command: $repo = 'd:\IT\PROJECT\VIBE-CODE\arisan-modol'; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; git -C $repo add -A; git -C $repo diff --cached --quiet 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { git -C $repo commit -m "auto: save changes $ts"; git -C $repo push origin master } else { exit 0 }
